name: Helen Gallagher
abstract: Helen Gallagher (July 19, 1926 – November 24, 2024) was an American actress, dancer, and singer. She received three Daytime Emmy Awards, two Tony Awards, a Donaldson Award, and a Drama Desk Award.

concerts.label: New York City Gay Men's Chorus

works.t: No, No, Nanette: Where Has My Hubby Gone Blues

concerts.label: Give My Regards to Broadway – A Salute to 125 Years of Musical Theater

about_quotes.speaker: Bucky Pizzarelli
about_quotes.evidence: I got called to play for Helen Gallagher or somebody, one of those great actresses that used to do the show.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bucky Pizzarelli interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 23, 2003 [interview 2 of 2]
